rationale: Tag 999 (2-byte tag-number form, 0xd9 0x03 0xe7) wrapping int 0. 999 is not among the tags either profile's schema permits (only bignum tags 2/3 are currently in scope). Well-formed, but violates the unknown-tags-are-a-hard-error rule (P8, and dCBOR's equivalent restriction).
Tag 0 (RFC 8949 text date/time, single-byte 0xc0) wrapping text "a"; not allow-listed (only bignum tags 2/3 are).
Tag 1 (epoch date/time, single-byte 0xc1) wrapping int 0; not allow-listed.
Tag 4 (decimal fraction, single-byte 0xc4) wrapping [0,0]; numerically adjacent to bignum tags 2/3 but not allow-listed.
Tag 100 in the 1-byte-argument form (0xd8 0x64) wrapping int 0; not allow-listed.
Tag 55799 (CBOR self-describe magic, 2-byte form 0xd9d9f7) wrapping int 0; not allow-listed.
